go_profile_condition_compileState.description: State model derived from go_profile_condition_compile TLA+ spec

AllMapped.message:
AllMapped violation: cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E r \in results :
                /\ r.tla_op = Tokens[k].tla
    ...
AllMapped.description: Verifier for invariant AllMapped from go_profile_condition_compile spec

HelperEmitted.message: HelperEmitted violation: (\E r \in results : r.needs_helper) => has_helper
HelperEmitted.description: Verifier for invariant HelperEmitted from go_profile_condition_compile spec

NoQuantifierNoHelper.description: Verifier for invariant NoQuantifierNoHelper from go_profile_condition_compile spec

NoError.description: Verifier for invariant NoError from go_profile_condition_compile spec

assert_AllMapped.condition:
cursor > N implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            \E r in results :
                and r.tla_op = Tokens[k].tla
                and r.go_op  = Tokens[k].go_op
assert_AllMapped.message:
Assertion failed: AllMapped — cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E r \in results :
                /\ r.tla_op = Tokens[k].tla
    ...
assert_AllMapped.description: Test assertion for AllMapped from go_profile_condition_compile spec

assert_HelperEmitted.condition: (\E r in results : r.needs_helper) implies has_helper
assert_HelperEmitted.message: Assertion failed: HelperEmitted — (\E r \in results : r.needs_helper) => has_helper
assert_HelperEmitted.description: Test assertion for HelperEmitted from go_profile_condition_compile spec

assert_NoQuantifierNoHelper.message: Assertion failed: NoQuantifierNoHelper — (~\E r \in results : r.needs_helper) => ~has_helper
assert_NoQuantifierNoHelper.description: Test assertion for NoQuantifierNoHelper from go_profile_condition_compile spec

assert_NoError.description: Test assertion for NoError from go_profile_condition_compile spec
